title: [Bug]: OpenAIChatFormatter: orphaned role="tool" message when self-paired Msg has empty content_blocks/tool_calls
body:
The normal self-paired multi-tool sequence works as expected:

ToolCallBlock(a)
ToolCallBlock(b)
ToolResultBlock(a)
ToolResultBlock(b)

It formats to:

assistant(tool_calls=[a,b])
tool(a)
tool(b)

The…
